allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\Users\\wavef\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\preview.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Host "done")
